Personal Info

First we'll create your Gopher account. This is also used for Gopher Request, so you'll only need to do it once.

Enter a valid email address (e.g. you@company.com)
Don't know it?

Business Info

Now tell us about your business. We'll create your Connect account once this is complete.

For the demo, use a fictitious 9-digit EIN (e.g. 12-3456789) — nothing is stored.

✓

Welcome to Gopher Connect!

Your account is ready. Save these for your records:

Gopher User ID—
Connect Account #—

Both have been emailed to you and added to your account profile.

Add Connect

Add Connect to your Gopher account

Enter the phone or email on your existing Gopher account. We'll send a one-time code to verify it's you, then pull in your profile so you only need to add Connect-specific details.

We couldn't find a Gopher account with that phone.

It happens — accounts are often linked under a different method. Try the other one:

Still no luck?

Enter your code

We sent a 6-digit code to your phone.

Didn't get it? Resend code

⚠️

All worker slots are filled

You've already approved the number of workers this request needs. To hire someone else, remove a hired Gopher first to free up a slot.

🚀

Your worker is ready!

Your request will now move to your dashboard. There you can track the progress by tapping View Live Activity in the Request Details.

⚠️

Heads up — your crew isn't full

You've hired 1 of 3 requested workers. You can absolutely start now if you're on a timeline, but any workers you haven't hired yet will be lost once you start — including any communication with them.

🗑️

Cancel this request?

This will cancel the request and notify any interested workers. Don't worry — a cancelled request isn't gone for good. You can always find it later under Previous Requests.

Gopher Assistant
Online · here to help
Hi! I can answer questions about Gopher Connect — billing, requests, workers, your account, anything. Ask me anything, or pick a starter below.
Talk to a person
✉️ Email supportsupport@gopherconnect.com · replies within 1 business day
✍️

Send us feedback

Tell us what's working, what isn't, or what you'd like to see. We read every message.

✓

Thanks — we got it.

Your note has been sent to the Gopher product team. If you asked us a question, we'll follow up by email within one business day.

⭐

Hire your Gopher again

Which type of work do you need them for?

ℹ️ To make sure your job gets done on time, your request will also be opened to other available workers after 5 minutes. Any worker outside of MY Gophers will need your approval before they're hired.
👥

Add more of your Gophers?

This request needs more than one worker. Add any of your other MY Gophers to give them first chance at the job, or skip to send it out normally.

📲

Request sent!

Devon M. will be alerted to your request immediately. If they accept, the request will move into your dashboard automatically. We'll also open it to other workers after 5 minutes just in case.

Built for whatever you need

One platform.
Every workforce need.

Connect grew out of businesses stretching the Gopher app to cover labor gaps it was never built for — so we built something that scales to meet them. Here are just a few of the ways teams put it to work.

Logistics

Courier & Delivery

Same-day couriers for documents, catering, retail drops, and B2B logistics across town.

Find couriers →
On-site

Bulk Labor

Surge crews for warehouse moves, inventory shifts, loading docks, and heavy lifting.

Book a crew →
Facilities

Office & Commercial Cleaning

Recurring or one-off cleans for offices, retail, and post-event spaces. Vetted teams.

Schedule a clean →
Skilled

Skilled Trades & Handymen

Licensed pros for installs, repairs, assembly, and on-site facility maintenance.

Hire a pro →
Events

Event Staffing & Setup

Day-of crews for setup, teardown, hospitality support, and venue logistics.

Staff an event →
Warehouse

Warehouse & Fulfillment

Pickers, packers, and forklift-certified workers for fulfillment surges and peak periods.

Scale fulfillment →

New Request Step 1 of 5
Your information is saved automatically

Built for Business

More than just on-demand hiring.

Connect gives your operations team the tools to scale workforce up or down without the friction of staffing agencies.

⚡

Lightning-Fast Matching

Most jobs are matched with a qualified worker in under 15 minutes. Surge crews available with as little as 2 hours notice.

🛡️

Vetted & Insured Workers

Every Gopher Elite and Gopher Pro is background-checked & ID-verified (Pros are licensed and insured). View every worker's ratings, reviews and work history to make your selection with confidence.

📊

On-Demand Billing & Reporting

We take care of paying the worker with Stripe Instant Payout billing. All hiring history available in real time in your dashboard.

👥

Build Your Own On-Demand Team

Connect allows you to save preferred workers after each job. You can also build your own on-demand team in your MY Gopher portal.

Simple Pricing

Plans for every business size.

No hidden fees. Pay only for what you use, or upgrade for premium features and priority access.

Starter

$0/mo

Perfect for small businesses with occasional workforce needs.

  • Up to 5 job posts/month
  • Access to standard worker pool
  • In-app payment processing
  • Basic job history & reporting
  • Email support
Get Started Free
Most Popular Try FREE for 30 days

Business

$49/mo

Built for growing businesses with regular on-demand staffing needs.

  • Unlimited job posts
  • Priority worker matching
  • Preferred worker lists
  • Consolidated monthly billing
  • Exclusive access to Gopher Elite workers
  • Deferred Payment Options
Start Business Plan

Enterprise

Custom

For large organizations needing volume, integrations, and SLAs.

  • Volume pricing & contracts
  • API & systems integration
  • Custom reporting & analytics
  • Dedicated workforce pool
  • 24/7 priority support
  • On-site onboarding
Contact Sales

Users & Access

Roles:   Owner — full access, billing, and ownership transfer.  ·  Admin — manage users, requests, and payment methods.  ·  User — submit and view their own requests.

MY Gophers · Your Preferred Workers

Workers you've saved from previous jobs OR access exclusively granted with your Business Plan. When you submit a new request, you can choose "MY Gophers only" to send the job to just this group first.
